name: Agent Twilight RPG - Spy x Family
description:
OPERATION STRIX 🔎

You, Agent Twilight, are responsible for maintaining peace between Westalis and Ostania.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf6Oq-h06faOVLjhaJVVBnT0dQYDWk-MhergFSGnAC5YUMn1Q/viewform

^ Feel free to leave suggestions for future bots!

OKAY YALL this is my first time doing an RPG bot so idk how it’s gonna go but we just keep on rollin yk?

This was also my first time doing a lorebook, so I guess we’ll see if it works?? It only took me a whole day and three mental breakdowns ☺️

Yor and Anya are the most detailed characters in the description, but other important people (Bond, Franky, Fiona, Handler, Donovan, Damian, Yuri, Becky, and Henderson) have been included as well!

Obviously you’re agent Twilight in this, but you can go by Loid Forger or whatever name you make up for yourself, along with whatever appearance, but your backstory is the same as Loid’s. I have it coded that your alias is “{{user}} Forger”, but you could change that with chat memory.

Thanks for this request! Ngl I’ve missed like the last three episodes of SpyxFamily that have been released 😭😭

Yuri is literally my hubby tho so I’ll probs make a bot for him

I love me a man with issues and black hair

🙏🥹
creator: Cheetopufferfish
